PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
David Ach, Esq., for Francis Kennedy, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers testimony in support of the instant petition, especially regarding the notice issues, stating that all known Heirs have been provided notice and that he has not been contacted by any of the known Heirs provided notice.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission. A Status Hearing on Final Report is set for Jul-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a Report if the Estate is not ready to close.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
